seoTitle: Rowena vs Royal National Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rowena and Royal National Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rowena vs Royal National Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rowena and Royal National Park.
heading: Rowena vs Royal National Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rowena, New South Wales and Royal National Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rowena has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Royal National Park (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rowena or Royal National Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rowena has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Royal National Park scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rowena scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Royal National Park scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rowena or Royal National Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rowena has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
